title: Creating a Dynamic Game AI
scenario: Design a dynamic game AI for a turn-based strategy game with a hexagonal grid and a set of 5 player types. The AI should be able to adapt to the player's moves and adjust its strategy accordingly. Use a decision tree-based AI algorithm and include specific features such as pathfinding and resource management.
constraints: Must use a decision tree-based AI algorithm
Must include a minimum of 5 player types

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the generated AI adapts to the player's moves and adjusts its strategy accordingly.
Check if the generated AI uses an efficient pathfinding algorithm.
Assess the resource management capabilities of the generated AI.
